title: Grsta Drinking Bottle, 1.5 Litres, Sports Bottle with Filter, for Carbonated Drinks, Easy to Clean, Leak-Proof, for Fitness, Camping, Hiking, Yoga
features: Safe and durable material: the 1.5 litre drinking bottle is made of imported food-grade plastic, which is non-toxic and odourless and offers you a good drinking experience. The wide mouth design of the drinking bottle makes it easy to clean and fill ice cubes. The water cup can be used at a temperature of -10°-80°, and you can enjoy water within this temperature range.

One-handed operation: the carbonated drinking bottle has a dust-proof spring bottle cap. You just need to turn the safety lock down and press the buckle lightly with one hand, and the lid opens so you can drink water quickly. Provides an easier and more convenient way to open the lid for boys, girls and people of all ages.

Time Scale Design The motivational water bottle with unique motivational quotes and time markers always remind you to drink the right amount of water. The level mark on the bottle is perfect for measuring your daily water consumption, allowing you to stay hydrated throughout the day, making it a practical and beautiful necessity in your daily life.

100% LEAK PROOF DESIGN The silicone seal on the lid prevents leaks, and the clip-on safety lock prevents the lid from accidentally opening, so you don't have to worry about your water bottle leaks or getting damaged. The frosted texture of the water bottle allows for a better grip and prevents slipping. You will receive a strong, durable and shockproof water bottle.

Perfect gift choice: the leak-proof water bottle is lightweight and comes with a portable lanyard on the bottle, you can hang it on a backpack or hold it in your hand and carry it with you easily. The water bottle is perfect for school, travel, sports, etc. At the same time, it is also an ideal gift for your children and loved ones.
description: From the brand Previous page Our story continues because of everyone who loves sports. GRSTA is passionate about making every product well. Our water bottles are made of food grade materials materials. We hope to bring you an excellent drinking experience while protecting your health. Whether you are hiking, exercising outdoors, or at home or in the gym, we can meet your hydration needs and make it your lifelong thirst-quenching companion! drinking bottle 1l drinking bottle 1.5 litre drinking bottle with filter drinking bottle with straw Next page
